VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is confirmed real, published at NeurIPS 2022 (arXiv:2201.11903). The cited author list matches the real authors — the discrepancy noted by the automated checker is only a minor name formatting difference (e.g., "Ed Chi" vs. "Ed H. Chi", "Fei Xia" vs. "F. Xia"), which is acceptable shorthand. Brian Ichter is also confirmed as an author in multiple sources.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.11903
